docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ALSHRAIDEH, SAMEH AS TO DEFENDANT CERVANTES, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED MAY-29-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CERVANTES, MARIA
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY ALSHRAIDEH, SAMEH
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 7/18/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "FORWARD TIME EXP RTN TO SEND."

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALSHRAIDEH, SAMEH ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF SAMEH ALSHRAIDEH IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED ARABIC INTERPRETER MAJED DAJANI. DEFENDANT MARIA CERVANTES IS NOT PRESENT. THE NON-COURT INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY COURTROOM CLERK: R.SAHATJIAN. THE PLAINTIFF WAS ASKED SERVERAL TIMES IF HE WANTED TO CONTINUE THIS MATTER FOR A COURT INTERPRETER BUT HE REFUSED EACH TIME. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
